scenarios.description: convexHullRecursive with all interior points strictly left of baseline exercises only upperHull recursion path
scenarios.precondition: list of 5 non-colinear points all above line from leftmost to rightmost
scenarios.expectedResult: returns hull containing endpoints and all intermediate extreme points in ascending order
pseudocode: TEST TC08 convexHullRecursive all points on left side

scenarios.description: convexHullRecursive with all interior points strictly right of baseline exercises only lowerHull recursion path
scenarios.precondition: list of 4 non-colinear points all below line from leftmost to rightmost
scenarios.expectedResult: returns hull containing only endpoints, as all others processed in lowerHull
pseudocode: TEST TC09 convexHullRecursive all points on right side

scenarios.description: convexHullRecursive throws NullPointerException when a null element is in the list
scenarios.precondition: list of size>=3 containing a null point among valid points
scenarios.expectedResult: NullPointerException is thrown during orientation computation
pseudocode: TEST TC10 convexHullRecursive null-element throws NPE
